topic: One streetlight turns on only when I pass beneath it, then follows me home.
title: A Streetlight Follows Me Home Every Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: One streetlight switched on only when I walked beneath it, then followed me home.
scenes.image_prompt: A single glowing streetlight on a dark empty street, halo of haze, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked home the same way from the train each night.
scenes.image_prompt: A long dim sidewalk leading away from a small train platform at night, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The street had a dozen lamps, all dead.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of dark unlit streetlamps along an empty road at night, faint moonlight, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: As I passed under one, it flickered to life behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: A streetlamp glowing alone behind a dark figure walking away, hazy light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
A suddenly dark streetlamp on a quiet road with faint residual glow, night fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next lamp lit as I reached it, exactly above my head.
scenes.image_prompt: A bright streetlamp directly overhead casting a circle of light on wet pavement, night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped walking. The light stayed lit, waiting.
scenes.image_prompt: A single lit streetlamp glowing over an empty stretch of dark road, halo of fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I moved, the next lamp ahead came on too.
scenes.image_prompt: Two streetlamps lit in sequence down a dark road toward a distant house, hazy glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Light by light, it walked me all the way to my gate.
scenes.image_prompt: A trail of glowing streetlamps leading to a small dim house at night, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the lamp over my porch switched on, though my house has none.
scenes.image_prompt: A bright unfamiliar lamp glowing above a front porch that has no fixture, night, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now I take the long way, through streets with no lamps at all.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure from behind walking a pitch dark path between houses, faint moonlight, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night a new lamp stood at the end of that path, already lit.
scenes.image_prompt: A solitary glowing streetlamp at the end of a dark unlit lane, halo of haze, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
